title: Advancement Plaques IM
description: This texture pack will replace the progress bar in the advancement plaques fashion with an interface like an ideal world.
body:
This resource pack replaces the standard appearance of the plates with improvements to the interface, as in an ideal world.

Note: This resource package requires Advancement Plaques to work.



![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59d314793bc9061173072c65ffea6502dffa2445.png)
